creator: karels@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Rpapousek from comment #150)
I think we are talking about different problems, or different manifestations.  My problem had nothing to do with install.  I had installed long ago on a much earlier release, and upgraded numerous times.  When I got to FreeBSD 12 (12.1, I think), I started to see these messages once per second after *every* boot even with no USB devices plugged in.  That was still true with 12.2.  I have since upgraded the motherboard, so the problem went with it.
